countries: Partitioned Zone between Saudi Arabia and Kuwait

supply_chain.dependencies: Caspian Pipeline Consortium provides critical export route for Tengiz field production in Kazakhstan. Angola LNG plant supplied with associated gas from multiple fields and operators. Reliance on major international oil export pipelines for crude oil transportation.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints and escalation of cost of goods and services. Long lead times for key capital equipment. Availability of offshore and specialized equipment under pressure. Potential disruptions from geopolitical events, civil unrest, severe weather, cyber threats. Concentration risk in CPC pipeline for Kazakhstan exports.

regulatory_risks: International agreements and national, regional, and state legislation and regulation related to greenhouse gas emissions and climate change
Paris Agreement implementation and country-specific policies
California's Cap-and-Trade Program and Low Carbon Fuel Standard
California Air Resources Board Advanced Clean Cars II regulations
U.S. Inflation Reduction Act incentives and impacts
Renewable Fuel Standard program in the U.S.
Hydraulic fracturing regulations and bans on drilling
Environmental regulations including U.S. federal Superfund sites and state laws
Pillar Two global minimum tax (15 percent) enacted in various jurisdictions
Windfall profit taxes in California, Australia and other jurisdictions
Changes in tax laws and regulations around the world
Sanctions and trade laws (Venezuela, Russia)
OPEC+ production quotas and constraints
Government mandated sales, divestitures, recapitalizations, taxes and tax audits, tariffs
Permit requirements and restrictions on scope of company operations
Income tax examinations and audits in multiple jurisdictions
Environmental laws including Resource Conservation and Recovery Act
Louisiana's State and Local Coastal Resources Management Act (SLCRMA)
Climate change-related litigation and governmental investigations
Methane-specific regulations including U.S. EPA Standards of Performance
Decommissioning obligations and regulatory requirements

sanction_risks: U.S. sanctions on Venezuela - operating under General License 41 with limitations
Sanctions imposed on Russia - potential impact on CPC pipeline operations and Kazakhstan exports
Risk of additional sanctions and trade restrictions affecting ability to produce, transport and export crude
Compliance with sanctions and trade laws of U.S. and other jurisdictions
